1.title: Disable application: ollama on openclaw
1.body: Comments out the `ollama` Kustomization block in `clusters/openclaw/openclaw-apps.yaml`. Other applications are unaffected. The app definition in `gitops/gitops-apps/ollama/` is retained.
1.pr_url: [local] PR #1: Disable application: ollama on openclaw

2.title: Disable application: qdrant on openclaw
2.body: Comments out the `qdrant` Kustomization block in `clusters/openclaw/openclaw-apps.yaml`. Other applications are unaffected. The app definition in `gitops/gitops-apps/qdrant/` is retained.
2.pr_url: [local] PR #2: Disable application: qdrant on openclaw
